description: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year to small and marginal farmers with cultivable land. Amount transferred in three installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank accounts.
eligibility: All landholding farmers with cultivable land. Excludes institutional landholders, farmer families holding constitutional posts, serving/retired officers, income tax payers.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each directly to bank account
application_process: Register at pmkisan.gov.in or through Common Service Centre or local agriculture department

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Housing for All mission providing financial assistance to urban poor for construction or purchase of houses. Subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh on home loans.
eligibility: EWS/LIG/MIG households without pucca house anywhere in India. Annual income up to ₹18 lakh.
benefits: Interest subsidy of 3-6.5% on home loans up to ₹2.67 lakh
application_process: Apply through bank, housing finance company, or Common Service Centre

description: Financial assistance to rural BPL households for construction of pucca houses with basic amenities.
eligibility: Houseless or kutcha house dwellers in rural areas from BPL category. Priority to SC/ST, minorities, disabled.
benefits: ₹1.20 lakh in plain areas, ₹1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office

ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
description: World's largest health insurance scheme providing coverage of ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
eligibility: Bottom 40% of Indian population as per SECC 2011 data. BPL families, SC/ST households, landless laborers.
benefits: Health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year
application_process: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or nearest empanelled hospital

description: Provides loans up to ₹10 lakh to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises. Three categories: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,001-5 lakh), Tarun (₹5-10 lakh).
eligibility: Any Indian citizen with business plan for non-farm income generating activity. No collateral required for Shishu loans.
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh at low interest rates
application_process: Apply at any bank, MFI, or NBFC. Online at udyamimitra.in

description: Small savings scheme for girl child providing high interest rate of 8.2% per annum. Tax benefits under Section 80C.
eligibility: Girl child below age 10. Maximum 2 accounts per family (3 in case of twins/triplets).
benefits: 8.2% annual interest, tax exemption under 80C, maturity after 21 years
application_process: Open account at post office or authorized bank with birth certificate

ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Free LPG connections to BPL households to replace traditional cooking fuels and reduce health hazards from indoor air pollution.
eligibility: Women from BPL households above 18 years without existing LPG connection.
benefits: Free LPG connection with first refill and stove
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor with BPL ration card and Aadhaar

description: Social security for BPL elderly, widows, and disabled persons. Includes Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension, Widow Pension, and Disability Pension.
eligibility: BPL elderly (60+), widows (40-79 years), severely disabled persons.
benefits: ₹200-500 per month pension
application_process: Apply at Block Development Office or Gram Panchayat

description: Free food grain scheme providing 5 kg of rice/wheat per person per month to National Food Security Act beneficiaries.
eligibility: All NFSA beneficiaries including Antyodaya Anna Yojana and Priority Household cardholders.
benefits: 5 kg free food grain per person per month
application_process: Automatically covered if you have NFSA ration card

description: Pension scheme for unorganized sector workers guaranteeing minimum pension of ₹1,000-5,000 per month after age 60.
eligibility: Indian citizens aged 18-40 years with bank account. Not covered under any statutory social security scheme.
benefits: Guaranteed pension ₹1,000-5,000/month after age 60
application_process: Enroll through bank or post office savings account

description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at annual premium of just ₹20.
eligibility: Bank account holders aged 18-70 years.
benefits: ₹2 lakh accidental death/total disability cover, ₹1 lakh partial disability
application_process: Enroll through bank account with auto-debit of ₹20 annually

description: Life insurance cover of ₹2 lakh at annual premium of ₹436 for bank account holders.
eligibility: Bank account holders aged 18-50 years.
benefits: ₹2 lakh life insurance cover
application_process: Enroll through bank account with auto-debit

description: Facilitates bank loans between ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore to SC/ST and women entrepreneurs for greenfield enterprises.
eligibility: SC/ST and women entrepreneurs above 18 years for greenfield projects in manufacturing, services, or trading.
benefits: Loans ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore at concessional rates
application_process: Apply at bank branch or standupmitra.in

description: Central platform for multiple scholarships for pre-matric, post-matric and merit-cum-means students from minority, SC/ST, OBC communities.
eligibility: Students from SC/ST/OBC/minority communities with family income below specified limits.
benefits: Scholarships ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹20,000 per year
application_process: Apply at scholarships.gov.in

scheme_name: Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: Skill development and placement program for rural youth aged 15-35 years to provide wage employment.
eligibility: Rural youth aged 15-35 years (up to 45 for SC/ST/PWD/women). No minimum education required.
benefits: Free skill training with placement assistance and post-placement support
application_process: Register at ddugky.gov.in or nearest project implementing agency

description: Skill certification scheme enabling Indian youth to take up industry-relevant skill training and earn recognition.
eligibility: Indian nationals who are school/college dropouts or unemployed.
benefits: Free skill training, certification, and monetary reward up to ₹8,000
application_process: Register at pmkvyofficial.org or nearest training centre

description: Guarantees 100 days of wage employment per year to rural households whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
eligibility: Adult members of rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.
benefits: 100 days guaranteed employment at minimum wage
application_process: Register at Gram Panchayat with household details

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Affordable working capital loan of ₹10,000-50,000 for street vendors to resume livelihoods after COVID disruption.
eligibility: Street vendors with vending certificate or letter of recommendation from ULB.
benefits: Collateral-free loans ₹10,000 to ₹50,000 with cashback incentives
application_process: Apply at pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in or Common Service Centre

description: Apprenticeship training for ITI pass-outs and freshers in industries with stipend support.
eligibility: Students who have passed Class 8 or above. ITI pass-outs get priority.
benefits: Monthly stipend ₹1,500-7,700 during apprenticeship period
application_process: Register at apprenticeshipindia.org

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Addresses declining child sex ratio and promotes welfare and education of the girl child through awareness and incentive programs.
eligibility: Girl children and their families across India.
benefits: Various state-level incentives for girl child education and welfare
application_process: Contact nearest Anganwadi or district office

description: Welfare fund for farmers in Kerala providing pension, accident insurance, critical illness benefit, and death benefit to registered farmers.
eligibility: Farmers who have cultivated land for at least one season and are registered with the Karshaka Kshemanidhi Board.
benefits: Monthly pension after 60 years, ₹1 lakh accident benefit, ₹50,000 critical illness benefit, ₹1 lakh death benefit
application_process: Register at nearest Karshaka Kshemanidhi Board office or Krishi Bhavan

description: Comprehensive welfare program for destitute persons in Kerala providing monthly financial assistance, food security, housing support, and healthcare through community centers.
eligibility: Destitute persons including homeless, extremely poor families, abandoned elderly, single women, differently-abled without support.
benefits: Monthly financial assistance, food security, housing assistance, healthcare support
application_process: Apply at nearest Local Self Government office or Kudumbashree unit

description: Provides ₹4 lakh assistance for house construction and land allotment for landless families and Kudumbashree members without proper housing.
eligibility: Landless homeless families, families living in dilapidated houses, Kudumbashree members without pucca house.
benefits: ₹4 lakh for house construction, land allotment for landless
application_process: Apply through local body or Kudumbashree unit with income and domicile proof

description: Kerala's women empowerment and poverty eradication program providing micro-loans, livelihood training, collective enterprise support, and linking women to government welfare schemes.
eligibility: Women from BPL and lower-income families in Kerala.
benefits: Micro-loans at low interest, livelihood training, collective enterprise support, government scheme linkage
application_process: Join nearest Kudumbashree Neighbourhood Group through local body

description: Educational assistance for children of BPL families and differently-abled children to prevent school dropouts.
eligibility: Children from BPL families and differently-abled children studying in government/aided schools.
benefits: Annual scholarship and educational materials support
application_process: Apply through school headmaster or nearest Social Security Mission office

description: Financial assistance for serious illnesses requiring expensive treatment for BPL families not covered under other health schemes.
eligibility: BPL cardholders in Kerala diagnosed with serious illnesses like cancer, kidney failure, heart disease.
benefits: Up to ₹2 lakh financial assistance for serious illness treatment
application_process: Apply at District Medical Office with BPL card and medical records

description: Welfare benefits including pension, maternity benefit, marriage assistance, and educational aid for agricultural workers registered under the fund.
eligibility: Agricultural laborers in Kerala registered with the Agricultural Workers Welfare Fund Board.
benefits: Monthly pension, ₹10,000 maternity benefit, marriage assistance, educational scholarship
application_process: Register at nearest Labour Office with employer certificate

description: Comprehensive welfare for construction workers including pension, accident benefit, marriage assistance, house construction loan, and educational aid.
eligibility: Construction workers who have worked for at least 90 days and registered with BOCW Board.
benefits: Pension, ₹1 lakh accident benefit, marriage and educational assistance, house construction loan
application_process: Register at nearest Labour Office with 90-day work certificate

description: Welfare scheme for traditional fishermen providing pension, accident insurance, housing assistance, and education support.
eligibility: Traditional fishermen registered with the Fishermen Welfare Fund Board.
benefits: Monthly pension, accident insurance, housing support, education assistance for children
application_process: Register at nearest Fisheries Department office

scheme_name: Chief Minister's Distress Relief Fund Kerala
description: Emergency financial assistance to people in distress due to natural calamities, accidents, or severe health conditions.
eligibility: Kerala residents facing financial distress due to calamity, accident, or serious illness.
benefits: One-time financial assistance based on need
application_process: Apply through District Collector's office with relevant documents

scheme_name: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister's Health Insurance
description: Health insurance providing cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family per year at government and empanelled private hospitals.
eligibility: Families with annual income below ₹72,000. Covers 1,027 procedures.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per family
application_process: Enroll through nearest government hospital with ration card

scheme_name: Tamil Nadu Amma Two Wheeler Scheme
description: Provides two-wheelers at subsidized rates for working women to facilitate commute.
eligibility: Working women in Tamil Nadu with annual income below ₹2.5 lakh.
benefits: Subsidy of ₹25,000 on purchase of two-wheeler
application_process: Apply at nearest District Employment Office

description: Direct cash transfer of ₹1,000 per month to women heads of eligible families.
eligibility: Women who are heads of family with annual income below ₹2.5 lakh.
benefits: ₹1,000 per month direct cash transfer
application_process: Apply at nearest government office with income and family documents

description: Provides free uniforms, books, notebooks, shoes, bags, and bicycle to government school students.
eligibility: Students studying in Tamil Nadu government schools.
benefits: Free uniform, books, notebook, shoes, bag, bicycle for eligible students
application_process: Automatically provided through school enrollment

description: Comprehensive pension scheme covering old age, widow, weavers, toddy tappers, fishermen, disabled, and HIV-affected persons.
eligibility: Various categories of vulnerable persons in Andhra Pradesh.
benefits: ₹2,750-10,000 per month pension depending on category
application_process: Apply through Navasakam or Village Secretariat

description: Annual financial assistance of ₹15,000 to mothers of school-going children to support education.
eligibility: Mothers with children attending government schools in Andhra Pradesh from white or yellow ration card families.
benefits: ₹15,000 per year for each child in government school
application_process: Automatically enrolled if child is in government school

description: Houses with all amenities provided free to homeless and kutcha house dwellers.
eligibility: Homeless or kutcha house dwellers not covered under any other housing scheme.
benefits: Free pucca house with electricity, water, toilet
application_process: Apply through Village Secretariat or Navasakam

description: Investment support of ₹10,000 per acre per season (₹5,000 for rabi, ₹5,000 for kharif) to all farmer landowners.
eligibility: All farmer landowners in Telangana with Pattadar passbooks.
benefits: ₹10,000 per acre per year (₹5,000 per season)
application_process: Automatically credited to registered bank account linked to Pattadar passbook

description: Maternity benefit scheme providing ₹12,000 cash and baby care kit to pregnant women for institutional delivery.
eligibility: Pregnant women in Telangana delivering at government hospitals.
benefits: ₹12,000 cash + baby care kit worth ₹5,000
application_process: Register at nearest government hospital during antenatal care

scheme_name: Maharashtra Mahatma Jyotirao Phule Jan Arogya Yojana
description: Health insurance coverage of ₹1.5 lakh per year for yellow and orange ration card holders at empanelled hospitals.
eligibility: Yellow and orange ration card holders in Maharashtra.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹1.5 lakh per year
application_process: Enroll at nearest government hospital with ration card

scheme_name: Maharashtra Sharad Pawar Gram Samridhi Yojana
description: Comprehensive agricultural development scheme providing irrigation, soil health, and crop support to farmers.
eligibility: Farmers in Maharashtra with agricultural land.
benefits: Irrigation support, soil testing, crop insurance subsidy
application_process: Apply at nearest Agriculture Office

description: Housing assistance for SC/ST, OBC, and BPL families in Karnataka for construction of new houses.
eligibility: SC/ST, OBC, and BPL families without pucca house in Karnataka.
benefits: Financial assistance up to ₹1.5 lakh for house construction
application_process: Apply at nearest RGRHCL office or taluk office

description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹2,000 to women heads of BPL families.
eligibility: Women who are heads of family holding BPL/APL ration card in Karnataka.
benefits: ₹2,000 per month direct benefit transfer
application_process: Apply through Seva Sindhu portal or nearest government office

description: Scholarship for SC/ST students pursuing higher education to cover tuition fees and maintenance allowance.
eligibility: SC/ST students admitted to recognized colleges in Karnataka with family income below ₹2.5 lakh.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement and maintenance allowance
application_process: Apply through college or karepass.cgg.gov.in

description: Provides daytime electricity to farmers for irrigation at nominal rates through solar power.
eligibility: Farmers in Gujarat with agricultural connections.
benefits: Daytime power supply for irrigation at affordable rates
application_process: Apply through PGVCL/UGVCL/MGVCL/DGVCL

description: Interest-free loans up to ₹1 lakh to women self-help groups for livelihood activities.
eligibility: Women SHG members in Gujarat.
benefits: Interest-free loan up to ₹1 lakh per SHG member
application_process: Apply through SHG or nearest bank

description: Financial assistance to relatives/neighbors caring for orphaned and destitute children to raise them in family environment.
eligibility: Relatives or neighbors raising orphaned children, children of imprisoned parents, or destitute children.
benefits: ₹500/month for 0-6 years, ₹1,000/month for 6-18 years, plus annual clothing allowance
application_process: Apply at District Social Justice Office

scheme_name: Rajasthan Mukhyamantri Chiranjeevi Swasthya Bima Yojana
description: Universal health coverage providing cashless treatment up to ₹25 lakh per family per year.
eligibility: All families in Rajasthan. BPL/NFSA families get free coverage; others pay ₹850/year premium.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹25 lakh per year
application_process: Register at chiranjeevi.rajasthan.gov.in or Jan Aadhaar center

description: Monthly financial assistance to women heads of household to ensure basic income support.
eligibility: Women heads of household between 25-60 years in West Bengal. SC/ST get ₹1,000/month, general ₹500/month.
benefits: ₹500-1,000 per month direct benefit transfer
application_process: Apply through Duare Sarkar camps or nearest government office

ministry: Women and Child Development, West Bengal
description: Conditional cash transfer to unmarried girls to continue education and prevent child marriage.
eligibility: Unmarried girls aged 13-18 years enrolled in school from families with annual income below ₹1.2 lakh.
benefits: Annual scholarship ₹1,000 + one-time grant ₹25,000 at 18 years
application_process: Apply through school with age and income proof

description: Financial assistance of ₹51,000 for marriage of daughters from BPL/SC families.
eligibility: BPL and SC families in Punjab with daughters getting married.
benefits: ₹51,000 marriage assistance
application_process: Apply at District Social Security Office

description: Student credit card providing loans up to ₹4 lakh for higher education at 4% interest rate.
eligibility: Students who have passed Class 12 from Bihar. No collateral required.
benefits: Loan up to ₹4 lakh at 4% interest for higher education
application_process: Apply at DRCC (District Registration and Counselling Centre)

description: Incentive scheme for girl child from birth to graduation providing financial support at various stages.
eligibility: Girl children born in Bihar from families with annual income below ₹1.5 lakh.
benefits: Total ₹54,100 given in stages from birth to graduation
application_process: Register through Anganwadi worker at birth

description: Universal health coverage providing cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh for general families and ₹10 lakh for women.
eligibility: All NFSA and SFSS beneficiary families in Odisha.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh (₹10 lakh for women)
application_process: Use smart health card at empanelled hospitals

description: Comprehensive livelihood and income augmentation scheme for farmers and landless agricultural workers.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers, landless agricultural households, vulnerable agricultural households in Odisha.
benefits: ₹10,000 per season for cultivation, ₹12,500 for livelihood activities
application_process: Apply at nearest agriculture office or kalia.odisha.gov.in

description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,250 to economically vulnerable families deposited in women's bank accounts.
eligibility: Economically vulnerable families in Assam with annual income below ₹2 lakh.
benefits: ₹1,250 per month deposited in woman member's bank account
application_process: Apply through Gram Panchayat or Urban Local Body

description: Financial benefit scheme for girl child providing cumulative investment of ₹1,43,000 over 21 years for education and marriage.
eligibility: Girl child born on or after January 1, 2006. Family should be enrolled in LIC.
benefits: ₹1,43,000 total in installments for education and marriage support
application_process: Apply at nearest Anganwadi or online at ladlilaxmi.mp.gov.in

scheme_name: Madhya Pradesh Mukhyamantri Kalyani Vivah Sahayata
description: Financial assistance of ₹2 lakh for marriage of widows in Madhya Pradesh.
eligibility: Widows in Madhya Pradesh getting remarried.
benefits: ₹2 lakh marriage assistance
application_process: Apply at District Social Justice Office

description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹3,000 to persons suffering from serious diseases like cancer, Parkinson's, muscular dystrophy, hemophilia, thalassemia, renal failure, and liver failure.
eligibility: HP residents with specified serious diseases having annual family income below ₹4 lakh.
benefits: ₹3,000 per month financial assistance
application_process: Apply at nearest CDMO office with medical certificate

description: Universal old age pension for all residents above 60 years not covered under any other pension scheme.
eligibility: All residents of Jharkhand above 60 years not receiving pension from any other source.
benefits: ₹1,000 per month pension
application_process: Apply at nearest Block Development Office

description: Nutrition support program for malnourished children and pregnant/lactating women providing supplementary food.
eligibility: Malnourished children under 5 years and pregnant/lactating women.
benefits: Daily nutritious meal, health monitoring, and medical referral
application_process: Register at nearest Anganwadi center

description: Monthly financial assistance to homemakers to recognize their contribution and provide economic security.
eligibility: Homemaker women in Goa with family income below ₹3 lakh per year.
benefits: ₹1,500 per month financial assistance
application_process: Apply at nearest Mamlatdar office

description: Crop insurance scheme providing financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage due to natural calamities, pests and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers including sharecroppers and tenant farmers growing notified crops.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss with premium subsidy of 50-95%
application_process: Apply through bank at time of crop loan or through insurance company

description: Provides soil health cards to farmers with crop-wise recommendations for nutrients and fertilizers.
eligibility: All farmers with agricultural land.
benefits: Free soil testing and customized fertilizer recommendations
application_process: Contact nearest Krishi Vigyan Kendra or agriculture department

description: Provides flexibility and autonomy to states to implement programs for agricultural growth based on local needs.
eligibility: Farmers, farmer groups, and agricultural cooperatives.
benefits: Subsidies for equipment, infrastructure, and capacity building
application_process: Apply through State Agriculture Department

description: Promotes poverty reduction through building strong institutions of poor, and provides support for diverse livelihoods including skilling and financing.
eligibility: Rural poor households, especially women.
benefits: SHG formation support, revolving fund, community investment fund, skill training
application_process: Join nearest SHG or contact Block Mission Management Unit

description: Flagship initiative providing tax benefits, easier compliance, funding access, and mentorship for startups.
eligibility: DPIIT-recognized startups less than 10 years old with annual turnover below ₹100 crore.
benefits: 3-year income tax exemption, capital gains exemption, faster exits, ₹10,000 crore fund
application_process: Register at startupindia.gov.in for DPIIT recognition

description: Credit-linked subsidy scheme for setting up micro enterprises in non-farm sector to generate employment.
eligibility: Any individual above 18 years for projects up to ₹50 lakh in manufacturing and ₹20 lakh in service sector.
benefits: 25-35% subsidy on project cost
application_process: Apply at nearest KVIC/KVIB office or through bank

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Integrated child development services providing nutrition, health, pre-school education for children 0-6 years and pregnant/lactating women.
eligibility: Children 0-6 years, pregnant women, and lactating mothers.
benefits: Supplementary nutrition, immunization, health checkup, pre-school education, referral services
application_process: Register at nearest Anganwadi center

description: Free cooked meals to children in government and government-aided schools from Class 1 to 8.
eligibility: All children enrolled in government and government-aided schools Classes 1-8.
benefits: Free nutritious mid-day meal on all school days
application_process: Automatic for enrolled students in eligible schools

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Provides food, preschool education, primary healthcare, immunization, health checkup, referral services to children under 6 and pregnant/nursing mothers.
eligibility: Children 0-6 years, pregnant women, lactating mothers, adolescent girls.
benefits: Supplementary nutrition, immunization, health education, preschool education
application_process: Visit nearest Anganwadi center

description: Financial inclusion program ensuring access to financial services - savings account, remittance, credit, insurance, pension.
eligibility: Any Indian citizen without a bank account.
benefits: Zero balance bank account, RuPay debit card, ₹1 lakh accident insurance, ₹30,000 life cover
application_process: Visit any bank branch with Aadhaar or other KYC documents

description: Financial incentive for construction of individual household toilets for BPL and identified APL families.
eligibility: Households without toilet. Priority to BPL, SC/ST, small and marginal farmers, landless laborers.
benefits: ₹12,000 incentive for toilet construction
application_process: Apply at Gram Panchayat

description: Provides safe and adequate drinking water through household tap connections to every rural household.
eligibility: All rural households without piped water connection.
benefits: Functional household tap connection with potable water
application_process: Contact Gram Panchayat or local water supply authority

description: Extended version of Ujjwala Yojana covering migrant workers and providing free LPG connection with first refill.
eligibility: Adult women from poor households not having LPG connection, including migrant workers.
benefits: Free LPG connection, first refill free, stove free
application_process: Apply at nearest LPG distributor

ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
description: Poverty alleviation program for urban poor through self-employment, skill training, and credit support.
eligibility: Urban poor families with annual income below poverty line.
benefits: Skill training, credit support, SHG formation, shelter for homeless
application_process: Apply at nearest Urban Local Body office

description: National database of unorganized workers providing them with identity, insurance, and access to social security schemes.
eligibility: Unorganized sector workers aged 16-59 years not covered under EPFO/ESIC.
benefits: Unique identity, ₹2 lakh accident insurance, access to social security schemes
application_process: Self-register at eshram.gov.in or nearest CSC

description: Scholarship for children who have lost one or both parents to continue education without financial hardship.
eligibility: Children who have lost father or both parents, studying in Classes 1-12 in Kerala.
benefits: Annual scholarship ₹4,800 to ₹7,200 depending on class
application_process: Apply through school with death certificate of parent

description: Home-based care services for elderly persons above 60 years who are bedridden or lonely.
eligibility: Senior citizens above 60 years in Kerala who are bedridden, differently-abled, or living alone.
benefits: Free home healthcare visits, physiotherapy, counseling, palliative care
application_process: Apply at nearest District Social Justice Office

description: Comprehensive primary healthcare through network of family health centers providing preventive and curative services.
eligibility: All residents of Kerala.
benefits: Free primary healthcare, medicines, diagnostic services at government centers
application_process: Visit nearest Family Health Centre with Aadhaar

description: Subsidized canteen scheme providing nutritious meals at highly subsidized rates to urban poor and workers.
eligibility: Any person can avail. Located at major public spaces.
benefits: Breakfast for ₹3, meals for ₹5-10
application_process: Walk-in at nearest Amma Unavagam canteen

description: Provides school kit including uniforms, books, bags, shoes to government school students.
eligibility: Students studying in government schools in Andhra Pradesh.
benefits: Complete school kit worth ₹3,475 per student
application_process: Automatically provided through school enrollment

description: Monthly financial assistance for care of children of single parents, widows, and destitute women.
eligibility: Children of single mothers, widows, or women in distress with income below ₹75,000.
benefits: ₹1,100 per month per child
application_process: Apply at District Women and Child Development Office

description: Provides additional 5 kg rice per month free to BPL ration card holders over and above NFSA entitlement.
eligibility: BPL ration card holders in Karnataka.
benefits: 5 kg additional free rice per person per month
application_process: Collect from nearest fair price shop with ration card

description: Financial assistance for marriage of daughters from SC/ST, BPL, and widow families.
eligibility: SC/ST, BPL families and widows in Haryana for marriage of daughter.
benefits: ₹51,000 marriage assistance
application_process: Apply at District Social Justice Office

description: Tool kit assistance to SC artisans and traditional workers to upgrade their occupation and income.
eligibility: SC artisans and traditional workers in Gujarat with family income below ₹1.20 lakh.
benefits: Tool kit worth ₹4,000 for 27 types of occupations
application_process: Apply at District Social Justice Office

description: Free coaching for competitive examinations like UPSC, RPSC, RSMSSB for SC/ST/OBC/EBC students.
eligibility: SC/ST/OBC/EBC/EWS students with family income below ₹8 lakh for competitive exam coaching.
benefits: Free coaching for UPSC/RPSC/engineering/medical entrance exams with stipend
application_process: Apply at sje.rajasthan.gov.in

description: Old age, disability, widow, and unmarried women pension scheme for BPL households.
eligibility: BPL elderly above 60, disabled above 5 years, widows above 40, unmarried women above 45 in Odisha.
benefits: ₹500 per month pension
application_process: Apply at Block Development Office

description: Enhanced monthly financial assistance for vulnerable families deposited in women's bank accounts.
eligibility: BPL and low-income families in Assam.
benefits: ₹1,250 per month deposited in woman member's account
application_process: Apply at Gram Panchayat or Town Committee

description: One-time financial assistance of ₹25,000 for marriage of women from economically weaker sections.
eligibility: Women above 18 years from families with annual income below ₹1.5 lakh in West Bengal.
benefits: ₹25,000 one-time marriage assistance
application_process: Apply at Block Development Office or municipality

description: Health insurance scheme for HP residents not covered under PMJAY providing cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh.
eligibility: HP residents not covered under Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per year
application_process: Enroll at nearest CSC or himcare.hp.gov.in

description: Financial support to single mothers for raising children and ensuring their education.
eligibility: Single mothers in Uttarakhand with children below 18 years.
benefits: Monthly financial assistance for child education and welfare
application_process: Apply at District Women and Child Development Office

description: Pension scheme for senior citizens providing assured return of 7.4% per annum with monthly pension option.
eligibility: Senior citizens above 60 years.
benefits: Assured pension of 7.4% per annum on investment up to ₹15 lakh
application_process: Purchase from LIC of India branches or online at licindia.in

description: Financial assistance and loans for disabled persons for self-employment and income generation.
eligibility: Disabled persons with 40% or more disability for income generation activities.
benefits: Loans up to ₹50 lakh at 5% interest for self-employment
application_process: Apply at NHFDC or through channelizing agencies

ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: Financial incentive for widow remarriage to reduce social stigma and promote second marriage.
eligibility: Widows remarrying. Varies by state.
benefits: Financial incentive ₹2-3 lakh depending on state
application_process: Apply at State Social Welfare Department

description: Pre-matric and post-matric scholarships for minority community students in Kerala.
eligibility: Students from Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Buddhist, Jain communities in Kerala with family income below ₹2 lakh.
benefits: Scholarship ₹5,000 to ₹10,000 per year
application_process: Apply at minoritywelfare.kerala.gov.in

description: Low-interest loans for SC individuals for self-employment, education, and housing.
eligibility: SC individuals in Kerala with annual income below ₹3 lakh.
benefits: Loans at 4-6% interest for self-employment and education
application_process: Apply at nearest KSCDC office

description: Subsidized canteen for workers and daily wage laborers providing affordable nutritious meals.
eligibility: Workers, laborers, and low-income urban residents.
benefits: Breakfast ₹5, lunch and dinner ₹10
application_process: Walk-in at nearest Thozhilalar Unavagam

description: Umbrella scheme to support farmers get remunerative prices for their produce through MSP operations.
eligibility: Farmers growing MSP crops.
benefits: Assured MSP procurement for notified crops
application_process: Register with APMC or State procurement agency

description: Credit card for farmers providing flexible credit for agricultural needs at subsidized interest rates.
eligibility: All farmers, sharecroppers, tenant farmers, and self-help groups of farmers.
benefits: Credit up to ₹3 lakh at 4% interest, crop insurance coverage
application_process: Apply at nearest bank with land records

description: Financial incentive scheme for girl child in 6 stages from birth to graduation to promote girl child welfare and education.
eligibility: Girl child born on or after April 1, 2019 from families with annual income below ₹3 lakh in UP.
benefits: Total ₹15,000 given in 6 installments from birth to Class 12
application_process: Apply at mksy.up.gov.in or nearest SDM office

scheme_name: UP Mukhyamantri Kisan Sarvhit Bima Yojana
description: Accident insurance of ₹5 lakh for farmers and their family members in Uttar Pradesh.
eligibility: Farmers aged 18-70 years in UP with landholding.
benefits: ₹5 lakh accident insurance, free treatment up to ₹2.5 lakh
application_process: Apply at nearest district agriculture office

description: Monthly pension for BPL elderly, disabled, and widows in Uttar Pradesh.
eligibility: BPL elderly above 60, disabled persons, and widows in UP.
benefits: ₹500 per month pension
application_process: Apply at nearest Block Development Office

description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹1,000 to women residents of Delhi.
eligibility: Women above 18 years who are registered voters in Delhi.
benefits: ₹1,000 per month direct benefit transfer
application_process: Apply through Delhi government portal or nearest office

scheme_name: Delhi Free Bus Travel for Women
description: Free travel for women in all DTC and cluster buses in Delhi.
eligibility: All women travelling in DTC and cluster buses in Delhi.
benefits: Free bus travel in all DTC and cluster buses
application_process: Obtain pink ticket from bus conductor

description: Online job portal connecting job seekers with employers across Delhi NCR.
eligibility: Job seekers in Delhi of any educational qualification.
benefits: Free job matching, skill development guidance, placement support
application_process: Register at jobsnearme.in

description: Financial assistance and skill training for women-headed households in Uttarakhand.
eligibility: Women heads of household in Uttarakhand with income below poverty line.
benefits: Skill training, financial assistance for self-employment
application_process: Apply at District Women Welfare Office

description: Monthly pension for elderly persons above 60 years in Uttarakhand.
eligibility: Residents above 60 years in Uttarakhand with annual income below ₹48,000.
benefits: ₹1,200 per month pension
application_process: Apply at nearest Block Development Office

description: Health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh for families not covered under Ayushman Bharat.
eligibility: Haryana residents with annual income below ₹1.80 lakh not covered under PMJAY.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per year
application_process: Enroll at nearest government hospital or CSC

description: Outsourced government jobs portal providing transparent contractual employment to youth in government departments.
eligibility: Haryana domicile youth seeking government contractual employment.
benefits: Transparent job placement in government departments
application_process: Register at hkrnl.itiharyana.gov.in

scheme_name: Chhattisgarh Rajiv Gandhi Kisan Nyay Yojana
description: Input subsidy to paddy, maize, and sugarcane farmers at ₹9,000 per acre per year.
eligibility: Paddy, maize, and sugarcane farmers in Chhattisgarh.
benefits: ₹9,000 per acre annual input subsidy
application_process: Register with Cooperative Society or Agriculture Department

description: Conditional cash transfer for girl child covering birth registration, immunization, school enrollment, and marriage at 18.
eligibility: Girl child born in Chhattisgarh from BPL families.
benefits: Total ₹1 lakh in installments tied to education and health milestones
application_process: Register at nearest Anganwadi center at birth

description: Monthly financial assistance for elderly, disabled, widows, and destitute persons in Goa.
eligibility: Goa residents who are elderly above 60, disabled, widows, or destitute with income below ₹3 lakh.
benefits: ₹2,500 to ₹3,000 per month depending on category
application_process: Apply at nearest Mamlatdar office

description: Financial incentive for families with two girl children to promote girl child welfare.
eligibility: Families with two girl children in Goa.
benefits: ₹1 lakh fixed deposit at birth of second girl child
application_process: Apply at nearest ICDS office

scheme_name: Jammu & Kashmir Back to Village Programme
description: Grassroots development program connecting government officials with panchayats to identify and address local needs.
eligibility: All residents of Jammu & Kashmir.
benefits: On-spot delivery of government services, scheme enrollment support
application_process: Participate during B2V camps in your panchayat

description: Financial assistance and skill training for differently-abled persons in J&K for self-employment.
eligibility: Differently-abled persons in J&K with 40% or more disability.
benefits: Skill training, financial assistance up to ₹50,000 for self-employment
application_process: Apply at District Social Welfare Office

description: Provides toilet construction support and sanitation facilities to households in Manipur.
eligibility: Households in Manipur without proper sanitation facilities.
benefits: ₹12,000 assistance for toilet construction
application_process: Apply at nearest Gram Panchayat or Urban Local Body

description: Support for sericulture and handloom weavers in Manipur for skill development and market linkage.
eligibility: Weavers and sericulture farmers in Manipur.
benefits: Free training, equipment support, market linkage assistance
application_process: Apply at District Industries Centre

scheme_name: Meghalaya Chief Minister's Social Security Scheme
description: Pension and financial assistance for elderly, widows, and disabled persons in Meghalaya.
eligibility: BPL elderly above 60, widows, and disabled persons in Meghalaya.
benefits: ₹400-600 per month pension
application_process: Apply at Block Development Office

description: Farmer-oriented scheme providing agricultural inputs, tools, and training to improve productivity.
eligibility: Farmers in Meghalaya with agricultural land.
benefits: Free seeds, fertilizers, tools, and training
application_process: Apply at Block Agriculture Office

description: Social security pension for elderly, widows, and disabled persons in Tripura.
eligibility: BPL elderly above 60, widows above 40, and disabled persons in Tripura.
benefits: ₹2,000 per month pension
application_process: Apply at Block Development Office or District Social Welfare Office

description: Educational scholarships, vocational training, and housing support for tribal communities in Tripura.
eligibility: ST community members in Tripura.
benefits: Scholarship, housing assistance, vocational training
application_process: Apply at Tribal Welfare Office

scheme_name: Nagaland Chief Minister's Health Insurance Scheme
description: Health insurance coverage for BPL families in Nagaland for hospitalization expenses.
eligibility: BPL families in Nagaland.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹1 lakh per year
application_process: Enroll at nearest district hospital

description: Support for rural communities through SHG formation, livelihood training, and micro-enterprise development.
eligibility: Rural poor households in Nagaland especially women.
benefits: SHG seed funding, skill training, micro-enterprise support
application_process: Join nearest SHG or contact Block Development Office

scheme_name: Mizoram Chief Minister's Social Security Scheme
description: Monthly financial assistance to elderly, widows, and disabled persons in Mizoram.
eligibility: Elderly above 60, widows, and disabled persons in Mizoram with BPL status.
benefits: ₹500 per month financial assistance
application_process: Apply at District Social Welfare Office

description: Agricultural development scheme replacing shifting cultivation with sustainable farming practices and income support.
eligibility: Farmers in Mizoram practising Jhum cultivation.
benefits: Alternative crop support, training, and income supplement
application_process: Contact District Agriculture Office

description: Financial assistance for vulnerable persons in Sikkim including elderly, disabled, and destitute.
eligibility: Elderly above 60, disabled, and destitute persons in Sikkim.
benefits: Monthly financial assistance ₹2,000-3,500
application_process: Apply at District Social Welfare Office

description: Support for organic farming practices with subsidies on organic inputs, certification, and market linkage.
eligibility: All farmers in Sikkim transitioning to organic farming.
benefits: Free organic inputs, certification support, market linkage
application_process: Apply at District Agriculture Office

scheme_name: Arunachal Pradesh Chief Minister's Arogya Arunachal Yojana
description: Health insurance coverage for residents of Arunachal Pradesh for hospitalization.
eligibility: All permanent residents of Arunachal Pradesh.
benefits: Cashless treatment up to ₹5 lakh per year
application_process: Enroll at nearest government hospital with domicile certificate

description: Subsidy and support for farmers to develop horticulture crops like kiwi, apple, and orange.
eligibility: Farmers in Arunachal Pradesh with suitable land for horticulture.
benefits: 50-75% subsidy on planting material, tools, and infrastructure
application_process: Apply at District Horticulture Office
